untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detecting 'upward price shocks of 30 points' which needs precise intra-bar shock detection or gap measurement. The allowed indicators do not include a dedicated shock detector. Using close vs prev_close with range approximation as proxy, but this does not capture the exact 'shock' mechanics described in the source material.
translation_notes: Approximated 'upward price shock > 30 points' using range > 30 combined with upward close movement. Expected decline of ~40 points suggests a reversal trade with short hold period. Exit condition AUTHOR_SILENT was replaced with a simple reversal (close < prev_close) as a reasonable mean-reversion exit. The signal is conceptually untranslatable without a true shock detector or volatility spike indicator.
